homepage.heroSubline: Ocean Sash and Door delivers quality window solutions with precision and care. Serving the Bay Area for over a decade.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Quality, Rooted in San Francisco
aboutText: Ocean Sash and Door was founded on a simple principle: provide San Francisco homeowners with superior window replacement services built on craftsmanship and integrity. We're not just installers; we're skilled tradespeople dedicated to preserving the architectural character of this city.

Our approach is hands-on and detail-oriented. From the initial consultation to the final inspection, we prioritize clear communication, meticulous workmanship, and lasting results. We understand the unique challenges of San Francisco homes, from fog-induced moisture to earthquake preparedness, and tailor our solutions accordingly.

We're committed to giving back to the community that has supported us. We actively participate in local initiatives, support neighborhood organizations, and prioritize sustainable practices in our operations. We believe in building a stronger, more resilient San Francisco, one window at a time.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Precision window installation by experienced professionals, ensuring optimal performance and longevity.

valueProps.description: Tailored window replacement options to match your home's style, budget, and energy efficiency goals.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of San Francisco architecture, building codes, and unique challenges facing homeowners.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Ocean Sash and Door for a free consultation and experience the difference quality makes.

services.name: Residential Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's beauty and efficiency with our expert window replacement services.
services.description:
We specialize in residential window replacement, providing homeowners with durable, energy-efficient solutions tailored to the unique architectural styles found throughout San Francisco. Whether you own a classic Victorian in the Haight, a modern condo downtown, or a charming bungalow in the Sunset, we have the expertise to handle your window replacement project with precision and care.

Our team will assess your existing windows, discuss your needs and preferences, and recommend the best replacement options to match your home's aesthetic and budget. We offer a wide selection of window styles, materials, and finishes to choose from, including wood, vinyl, fiberglass, and aluminum. We prioritize energy-efficient windows to help you reduce your energy bills and create a more comfortable living environment, especially with the fluctuating temperatures and frequent fog of the Bay Area.

From initial measurements to final installation, we handle every aspect of the project with meticulous attention to detail. We ensure a perfect fit and proper sealing to prevent drafts, leaks, and noise pollution. Our goal is to provide you with beautiful, high-performing windows that enhance your home's value and comfort for years to come.
process: Step 1: In-home consultation and assessment of existing windows.
Step 2: Detailed proposal outlining window options, materials, and pricing.
Step 3: Precise measurements and ordering of custom-fit windows.
Step 4: Professional installation with minimal disruption to your home.
benefits: Improved energy efficiency and reduced energy bills
Enhanced home security and noise reduction
Increased property value and curb appeal
Customized window styles to match your home's architecture

faq.question: How long does a typical window replacement project take?
faq.answer: The duration of a window replacement project depends on the number of windows being replaced and the complexity of the installation. We will provide you with a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do you offer energy-efficient window options?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a wide selection of energy-efficient windows designed to meet or exceed Energy Star standards. These windows can help you save money on your energy bills and reduce your carbon footprint.

faq.question: Are your installers licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our installers are licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind. We adhere to the highest safety standards and building codes.

services.name: Commercial Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your commercial space with durable, energy-efficient window solutions.
services.description:
Ocean Sash and Door provides comprehensive commercial window replacement services for businesses throughout San Francisco. From historic buildings in North Beach to modern office spaces in SOMA, we have the expertise to handle projects of any size and complexity.

We understand the unique challenges of commercial window replacement, including minimizing disruption to business operations, adhering to strict building codes, and ensuring compliance with energy efficiency standards. We work closely with property managers, architects, and contractors to develop customized window solutions that meet your specific needs and budget.

Our team is experienced in installing a wide range of commercial window systems, including storefront windows, curtain walls, and ribbon windows. We use high-quality materials and advanced installation techniques to ensure long-lasting performance and energy savings. We also offer window film options to enhance privacy, reduce glare, and improve security. Whether you're looking to improve the aesthetics of your building, reduce energy costs, or enhance tenant comfort, Ocean Sash and Door is your trusted partner for commercial window replacement in San Francisco.
process: Step 1: Site assessment and consultation with property managers.
Step 2: Development of customized window replacement plan.
Step 3: Permitting and compliance with building codes.
Step 4: Efficient and professional window installation.
benefits: Improved energy efficiency and reduced operating costs
Enhanced building aesthetics and tenant satisfaction
Increased property value and marketability
Compliance with local building codes and regulations

faq.question: Do you offer financing options for commercial window replacement projects?
faq.answer: Yes, we can connect you with reputable lenders who offer financing solutions for commercial building improvements.

faq.question: Can you work around our business hours to minimize disruption?
faq.answer: Yes, we are flexible and can schedule our work to minimize disruption to your business operations. We can work evenings, weekends, or during off-peak hours.

faq.question: Are your commercial window installations covered by a warranty?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our commercial window installations are backed by a comprehensive warranty covering both materials and workmanship.

services.name: Window Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Extend the life of your windows with our expert repair and maintenance services.
services.description:
Ocean Sash and Door offers comprehensive window repair services to address a wide range of issues, from cracked glass and broken hardware to drafty frames and water leaks. We understand that replacing windows can be a significant investment, so we strive to provide cost-effective repair solutions that extend the life of your existing windows.

Our skilled technicians have years of experience repairing all types of windows, including wood, vinyl, aluminum, and fiberglass. We use high-quality replacement parts and proven repair techniques to ensure lasting results. We can repair or replace damaged glass, repair or replace broken locks and latches, re-glaze windows to prevent air leaks, and repair or replace damaged window frames.

Whether you have a single broken window or multiple windows in need of repair, Ocean Sash and Door is here to help. We offer prompt and reliable service, and we always provide upfront pricing before starting any work. We pride ourselves on our honest and transparent approach, and we're committed to providing you with the best possible window repair services in San Francisco.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of damaged windows.
Step 2: Detailed repair plan and cost estimate.
Step 3: Professional repair or replacement of damaged components.
Step 4: Quality control and final inspection.
benefits: Cost-effective alternative to window replacement
Extended window lifespan and performance
Improved energy efficiency and comfort
Enhanced home security and aesthetics

faq.question: Can you repair windows in historic buildings?
faq.answer: Yes, we have experience repairing windows in historic buildings throughout San Francisco. We understand the importance of preserving the original character of these buildings, and we use appropriate repair techniques and materials.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency window repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency window repair services for situations that pose a security risk or safety hazard. Contact us for immediate assistance.

faq.question: How do I know if my windows need to be repaired or replaced?
faq.answer: If your windows are drafty, leaking, difficult to open or close, or have visible damage, it's time to consider repair or replacement. Contact us for a professional assessment.

services.name: Window Insulation Services
services.shortDescription: Seal your windows for optimal energy efficiency and comfort.
services.description:
Combat San Francisco's chilly fog and fluctuating temperatures with our professional window insulation services. Ocean Sash and Door specializes in sealing and insulating existing windows to improve energy efficiency, reduce drafts, and enhance comfort. We understand that many older San Francisco homes have original windows that may not be as energy-efficient as modern windows, so we offer a range of insulation solutions to help you maximize the performance of your existing windows.

Our insulation services include weatherstripping, caulking, and window film application. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to create a tight seal around your windows, preventing air leaks and reducing energy loss. We also offer window film options that can block harmful UV rays, reduce glare, and improve insulation. Our team can assess your windows and recommend the best insulation solutions to meet your specific needs and budget.

By insulating your windows, you can significantly reduce your energy bills, create a more comfortable living environment, and minimize noise pollution. Ocean Sash and Door is committed to providing you with cost-effective and reliable window insulation services that improve the performance and longevity of your windows.
process: Step 1: Energy audit and window inspection.
Step 2: Sealing gaps around window frames.
Step 3: Application of weather stripping.
Step 4: Professional caulking application.
benefits: Reduced energy bills and carbon footprint
Improved indoor comfort and temperature consistency
Reduced noise pollution from outside
Extended lifespan of windows

faq.question: What type of weather stripping do you use?
faq.answer: We use a variety of weather stripping materials, including foam, felt, and silicone, depending on the type of window and the size of the gap. We'll choose the best option for your specific needs.

faq.question: How long does window insulation last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of window insulation depends on the materials used and the weather conditions. Generally, weather stripping and caulking can last for several years with proper maintenance.

faq.question: Can window film really improve insulation?
faq.answer: Yes, window film can significantly improve insulation by reducing heat transfer through the glass. It can also block harmful UV rays and reduce glare.

services.name: Custom Window Design and Installation
services.shortDescription: Create unique window solutions tailored to your architectural vision.
services.description:
For homeowners seeking truly unique window solutions, Ocean Sash and Door offers custom window design and installation services. We work closely with architects, designers, and homeowners to create custom windows that perfectly match your architectural vision and enhance the beauty of your home. Whether you're looking for a specific shape, size, material, or finish, we can create windows that are tailored to your exact specifications.

Our team has extensive experience in designing and installing custom windows in a variety of architectural styles, from Victorian and Edwardian to modern and contemporary. We use high-quality materials and advanced manufacturing techniques to ensure that your custom windows are both beautiful and durable. We also offer a wide range of glazing options, including energy-efficient glass, decorative glass, and privacy glass.

From initial design to final installation, we handle every aspect of the project with meticulous attention to detail. We ensure that your custom windows are perfectly fitted and properly sealed to provide optimal performance and energy efficiency. Ocean Sash and Door is committed to providing you with exceptional custom window solutions that exceed your expectations.
process: Step 1: Design consultation with architect/designer.
Step 2: Window design and material selection.
Step 3: Fabrication of custom windows.
Step 4: Professional installation and finishing.
benefits: Unique window designs tailored to your style
Enhanced architectural aesthetics
Increased property value
Personalized window solutions

faq.question: What types of materials can be used for custom windows?
faq.answer: We can create custom windows from a variety of materials, including wood, vinyl, aluminum, and fiberglass. We'll help you choose the best material based on your aesthetic preferences, budget, and performance requirements.

faq.question: How long does it take to design and install custom windows?
faq.answer: The timeline for custom window design and installation depends on the complexity of the design and the availability of materials. We'll provide you with a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on custom windows?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on all of our custom windows, covering both materials and workmanship.

services.name: Window Screen Services
services.shortDescription: Enjoy fresh air without the pests with our window screen services.
services.description:
Ocean Sash and Door provides comprehensive window screen services, including screen repair, replacement, and custom screen fabrication. We understand the importance of having functional window screens in San Francisco, especially during the warmer months when you want to enjoy fresh air without letting in insects.

Our team can repair or replace damaged window screens, including torn mesh, bent frames, and broken hardware. We use high-quality screen materials and durable hardware to ensure lasting performance. We also offer custom screen fabrication services for windows that require unique sizes or shapes. We can create screens for casement windows, sliding windows, and other specialty windows.

Whether you need a single screen repaired or a complete set of new screens for your home, Ocean Sash and Door is here to help. We offer prompt and reliable service, and we always provide upfront pricing before starting any work. We're committed to providing you with the best possible window screen services in San Francisco.
process: Step 1: Screen assessment and quote
Step 2: Screen repair or screen replacement
Step 3: Custom screen fabrication if needed
Step 4: Installation and quality check
benefits: Keeps insects out while letting fresh air in
Maintains good visibility
Protects interior from debris
Extends window life by reducing direct sunlight exposure

faq.question: What materials do you use for window screens?
faq.answer: We use a variety of screen materials, including fiberglass, aluminum, and stainless steel. We'll help you choose the best material based on your needs and preferences.

faq.question: How long does it take to repair or replace a window screen?
faq.answer: Most screen repairs can be completed within a few hours. Custom screen fabrication may take a few days, depending on the complexity of the design.

faq.question: Can you match the color of my existing window screens?
faq.answer: Yes, we can match the color of your existing window screens to ensure a seamless look.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Ocean Sash and Door did an amazing job replacing the windows in my Victorian home in the Mission. They were professional, efficient, and the new windows look fantastic! The team was respectful of my home and cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David P.
reviews.text: I had a broken window in my condo in South Beach, and Ocean Sash and Door came to the rescue quickly. They were able to repair the window instead of replacing it, which saved me a lot of money. The repair was done well and the window looks great now.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: We worked with Ocean Sash and Door to design custom windows for our home renovation project in Pacific Heights. The team was incredibly creative and helped us bring our vision to life. The windows are stunning and have completely transformed the look of our home.

reviews.name: Robert L.
reviews.text: Ocean Sash and Door replaced the windows in our office building downtown. They were very professional and efficient, and they minimized disruption to our business operations. The new windows look great and have improved the energy efficiency of our building.

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: I had Ocean Sash and Door insulate the windows in my home, and it has made a huge difference in the comfort level. My home is much warmer in the winter and cooler in the summer and my energy bills have gone down. Great service!

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: Excellent service! Ocean Sash and Door repaired all the torn screens in my house. They were quick, affordable, and did a fantastic job. Now I can finally open my windows without worrying about bugs.
